title: Creamy Spicy Tunisian Lamb Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful Tunisian dish featuring lamb, tabasco sauce, and a blend of spices, perfect for a lazy Sunday, this paleo-friendly recipe is grassy and silky in texture.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and cook until it starts to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the garlic, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tabasco sauce and chicken broth, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 1 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Remove the lid and simmer for an additional 30 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
Let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve with cauliflower rice or paleo-friendly sides.
